title: repo_cooldown
description: Automatic cooldown gate. Scorer regenerates this file when it records an outcome, scanning the last 180 days of merge_outcomes.jsonl. Rules: ≥2 of {closed_no_merge, abandoned, suspicious_halt} in 180 days with 0 merged in the same window → cooldown for 90 days from the most recent negative outcome. Any suspicious_halt in the last 180 days → cooldown for 180 days from that outcome (higher bar to return). Any merged in the last 180 days → counter resets; no cooldown applies. Auto-expiring.

version.description: Schema version; increment on breaking changes

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this file was last regenerated by the scorer

cooldowns.description: Repos currently in cooldown; entries with cooldown_until in the past are stale and ignored on next regeneration

negative_outcomes_180d.description: Count of closed_no_merge, abandoned, or suspicious_halt outcomes in the last 180 days

last_merged_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent merged outcome, or null if none in 180 days

cooldown_until.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the cooldown expires and the repo becomes eligible again

triggering_outcomes.description: The outcome types that triggered this cooldown (e.g. closed_no_merge, abandoned, suspicious_halt)
